identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

colors.description: A sterile, high-contrast lab aesthetic with industrial safety accents.

primary.name: Deep Lab Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, strong headings

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, modal headers

data.usage: Formulation data, chemical formulas, code snippets

customization_rules: Do not use default Card component for everything. Use flat layouts with borders.
Inputs must have 'h-12' for better touch targets.
Buttons should be 'h-11' or 'h-12' for primary actions.
Use 'Sonner' for toasts, not default toast.
Dropdowns must NOT have transparent backgrounds.

buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-transparent h-11

landing_page.structure: Asymmetrical bento grid. Hero section uses 2/3 width for text, 1/3 for 3D/Image. Feature section uses alternating large/small blocks.
landing_page.background: White with subtle 'noise' texture or faint grid lines.

dashboard.structure: Sidebar navigation (fixed). Main content area with 4-column grid. Widgets span 1, 2, or 4 columns.
dashboard.density: High. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for data tables. Minimal padding inside data cells.

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section, potentially with a gradient overlay

auth_background.usage: Split screen background for Login/Register pages

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is Slate-900 on White, or White on Slate-900.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Follow the E1 persona. Do not build generic 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use the provided image URLs. Stick to the 'Scientific Precision' color palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_structure: Use the existing Shadcn components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui. Create new page components in /app/frontend/src/pages/.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Ensure React Router is set up for all key pages (Landing, Login, Dashboard, etc.).
instructions_to_main_agent.state_management: Use React Context or simple state for MVP. Mock API calls if backend is not ready.

universal_guidelines.no_ai_slop: Avoid generic centered layouts and gradients.
universal_guidelines.export_conventions: Named exports for components, default exports for pages.
